hooks.command: loto whoami --ensure --json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('LOTO_AGENT_ID='+d['uuid'])" >> $CLAUDE_ENV 2>/dev/null || true

p=$PPID; i=0; while [ $i -lt 12 ]; do c=$(ps -o comm= -p "$p" 2>/dev/null | sed 's#.*/##'); if [ "$c" = claude ]; then echo "LOTO_PID=$p" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV"; break; fi; np=$(ps -o ppid= -p "$p" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); case "$np" in ''|*[!0-9]*) break;; esac; [ "$np" -le 1 ] && break; p=$np; i=$((i+1)); done 2>/dev/null || true

p=$PPID; i=0; while [ $i -lt 12 ]; do c=$(ps -o comm= -p "$p" 2>/dev/null | sed 's#.*/##'); if [ "$c" = claude ]; then echo "LOTO_PID=$p" >> "$CLAUDE_ENV"; break; fi; np=$(ps -o ppid= -p "$p" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); case "$np" in ''|*[!0-9]*) break;; esac; [ "$np" -le 1 ] && break; p=$np; i=$((i+1)); done 2>/dev/null || true
